emails.subject: New/Revised General Motors NDA
emails.body: New/Revised General Motors NDA So I don't forget when you get back, I just spoke to John Allario, and we either need to amend or draft a new NDA for General Motors to deal with some new business approaches Net Works is making with them. We'll need to possible add in 3 other Enron companies, so when you get back give me a call and I'll bring my notes around and we can discuss this.

emails.subject: New/Revised General Motors NDA
emails.body: New/Revised General Motors NDA So I don't forget when you get back, I just spoke to John Allario, and we either need to amend or draft a new NDA for General Motors to deal with some new business approaches Net Works is making with them. We'll need to possible add in 3 other Enron companies, so when you get back give me a call and I'll bring my notes around and we can discuss this.

emails.subject: Re: New/Revised General Motors NDA
emails.body: Re: New/Revised General Motors NDA Tana Is there more to this than adding three companies? If so, let's talk. If not, take a crack at drafting and we can discuss on Monday. If you want to forward the notes, I will look at them over the weekend. Mark Senior Counsel, EWS Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3490 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Tana Jones@ECT 05/16/2001 05:31 PM
